'''鈭歵h-p-l-n''' ('''kathaplenoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:electroshock|electroshock]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-p-l-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:electroshock|electroshock]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-p-l-n
|-
! Lemma
| kathaplenoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithaplenoko|thithaplenoko]] || [[word:jithaplenoko|jithaplenoko]] || [[word:shithaplenoko|shithaplenoko]] || [[word:kithaplenoko|kithaplenoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthaplenoko|thuthuthaplenoko]] || [[word:jujuthaplenoko|jujuthaplenoko]] || [[word:shushuthaplenoko|shushuthaplenoko]] || [[word:kukuthaplenoko|kukuthaplenoko]]
|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
